issues.message: Sales grain is outlet x date only. True SKU forecasting is not possible until outlet x SKU x date feed is added.
issues.mitigation: Rule-based SKU rationalization engine marked 'interim'; placeholder module scaffolded for real SKU feed.

issues.message: 2,171 of 4,899 outlets have no sales rows in the provided feed.
issues.mitigation: Flagged in outlet table; excluded from forecasting but still surfaced as dormant risk.

issues.message: 439 outlets lack lat/lng and will not appear on the map.
issues.mitigation: Map view renders only geo-located outlets; others surfaced in table views.

issues.message: 20416 sales rows bear dates beyond today (likely Excel type coercion or forward entries).
issues.mitigation: Forecasting uses a train cutoff of today to avoid leakage.

issues.message: GPS logs, Suraksha App transactions, and depot dispatch schedules are not present in the uploaded files.
issues.affected: route intelligence, consumer intelligence, depot balancing
issues.mitigation: Dedicated modules are scaffolded with wire-in contracts; UI surfaces placeholders.

analytics_feasible_now: outlet anomaly detection (Isolation Forest + peer z-score)
rule-based SKU rationalization (price band x pack x category)
analytics_pending_feeds: true outlet x SKU demand forecasting
GPS route deviation, fleet utilization, delivery SLA
Suraksha consumer preference and micro-market demand
depot stock balancing and inter-depot transfer priorities
